notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Keeps clean admin flows from CC7.5.7.
Fixes gifts step 4/6: photo/file attachment is captured as gift content instead of falling through to main menu.
Gift claim button now handles callback and sends stored gift to user DM when possible.
Post repatch preserves existing comment count instead of resetting visible counter to zero.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
